questions.question: The Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC), in collaboration with which of the following universities, organised the symposium ‘India 2047: Building a Climate-Resilient Future’ at Bharat Mandapam, New Delhi, in March 2025?
What is one key benefit of India’s Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI) model shared at the BRICS meeting in 2025?
According to the 2025 report by McKinsey & Company and BoF, by what percentage is India's ultra-high-net-worth individual (UHNWI) population expected to grow by 2028?
Which country retained the top spot for the second consecutive year in the Henley Passport Index released in January 2025?
The Centre of Excellence on 'Classical and Quantum Communications for 6G' inaugurated at IIT‑Madras in July 2024, functions under which umbrella programme?
Buddha Purnima was celebrated on which date in 2025?
Which eminent Kathak dancer from Gujarat was awarded the Padma Vibhushan in 2025 for her outstanding contributions to Indian classical dance?
In 2025, which organisation has developed a new nanoporous multilayered polymeric membrane for high-pressure seawater desalination?
questions.option_1: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research

questions.question: In 2025, the United Nations called for peace talks between which two countries after missile exchanges intensified their long-standing conflict?

Which Indian ministry has put in the public domain the Draft National Code Against Age Fraud in Sports (NCAAFS) 2025 for inviting comments and suggestions from the general public and stakeholders, as part of the consultation process in March 2025?
questions.option_1: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports
questions.option_2: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
questions.option_4: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

questions.question: Which country signed a contract with India in April 2025 to supply 26 Rafale Marine fighter jets?
Where will the 18ᵗʰ edition of Pravasi Bharatiya Divas (PBD) be held in 2025?
Which initiative, launched in 2025, aims to develop quantum-encrypted communication for tamper-proof defence networks in India?
Which of the following space agencies successfully docked the SpaDeX satellite in January 2025?
Which statutory body organised a two-day National Conference on ‘Environment – 2025’ at Vigyan Bhawan, New Delhi, in March 2025?
When was 'Operation Shield' conducted across India’s border states and union territories?
What is the name of ISRO's mission launched in January 2024 to study the polarisation of cosmic X-rays?
Which region in France is home to the massive white hydrogen reserve discovered in 2025, which is a game-changer for clean energy?
The Department of Financial Services (DFS) notified amalgamation of 26 Regional Rural Banks (RRBs) on the principles of ‘One State One RRB’ in which phase of amalgamation of RRBs in 2025?
Where was the 2025 Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation (APEC) Sports Policy Network Roundtable Meeting & Forum held?
Recipient of Padma Shri in 2025, Shri Onkar Singh Pahwa, is related to which cycle company of India?
Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) India, which added more than 7.5 lac new subscribers in the month of March 2025, comes under which ministry of Government of India?
questions.option_2: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions
questions.option_3: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation

questions.question: As of 2024, who among the following holds the national record in women’s weightlifting (49 kg category) in India?
The Khelo India Youth Games 2025 was organised from which date to which date at different locations in Bihar?
Which of the following organisations was one of the co-organisers of the 14ᵗʰ Asian Fisheries and Aquaculture Forum (14AFAF) held from 12 to 15 February 2025 at Pusa Campus, New Delhi?
